_comment: Telegram bot token pool for Realtor Assistant. Create new bots via @BotFather on Telegram. When the pool runs low, generate more.
_how_to_create: Message @BotFather on Telegram, send /newbot, follow prompts. Paste the token below.
_in_use: Currently assigned to a realtor instance
_instructions: To add a bot: 1) Chat with @BotFather on Telegram 2) Send /newbot 3) Give it a name like 'Jane Doe Realtor Assistant' 4) Give it a username like @JaneDoeRealtorBot 5) Copy the token and add it to the 'available' array above. To assign: move the token from 'available' to 'in_use' with the realtor's name as key.
